2605.30090.title: DirectorBench: Diagnosing Long-Form Video Generation with Personalized Multi-Agent Evaluation
2605.30090.paper_summary: Long-form video generation is rapidly moving from short, single-scene synthesis toward minute-long, multi-shot creation with narrative structure, cinematic control, audio, and cross-modal synchronization. However, evaluating such videos remains challenging, since existing benchmarks largely focus on local visual quality, short-horizon temporal consistency, or generic prompt alignment, and provide limited diagnosis of workflow failures and user-dependent preferences. We introduce DirectorBench, a personalized multi-agent diagnostic benchmark for long-form video generation. DirectorBench evaluates generated videos with respect to 80 structured metadata entries, 7 user profiles, and 40 checkpoint criteria across 5 dimensions: script, visual, audio, cross-modal, and stability. Instead of reducing quality to a single aggregate score, DirectorBench localizes checkpoint-level bottlenecks and supports profile-aware evaluation. We evaluate 4 long-form video generation workflows, 6 base LLMs, and 7 user profiles. Across workflows, DirectorBench reveals a between-unit bottleneck: transition quality averages only 0.256 and reaches 0.356 for the best workflow, while prompt-level user demand fulfillment averages 0.71. We further conduct human evaluation with 14 annotators to validate the alignment between DirectorBench and human judgment. The results show that DirectorBench captures human-perceptible quality differences and reveals workflow- and profile-dependent failure modes that are hidden by aggregate scoring. These findings highlight the importance of diagnostic and profile-aware benchmarking for long-form video generation.
2605.30090.paper_summary_zh: 長格式視頻生成正迅速從短小的單場景合成轉向具有敘事結構、電影控制、音頻和跨模態同步的分鐘長多鏡頭創作。<lb/>然而，評估這類視頻仍然具有挑戰性，因為現有的基準主要集中在局部視覺質量、短期時間一致性或通用提示對齊上，並且對工作流程失敗和用戶依賴偏好的診斷有限。<lb/>我們引入了DirectorBench，一個針對長格式視頻生成的個性化多代理診斷基準。<lb/>DirectorBench根據80個結構化元數據條目、7個用戶檔案和40個檢查點標準在5個維度上評估生成的視頻：劇本、視覺、音頻、跨模態和穩定性。<lb/>DirectorBench不僅僅將質量簡化為單一的綜合分數，而是定位檢查點級別的瓶頸並支持基於檔案的評估。<lb/>我們評估了4個長格式視頻生成工作流程、6個基礎LLM和7個用戶檔案。<lb/>在工作流程中，DirectorBench揭示了一個單位間的瓶頸：過渡質量平均僅為0.256，最佳工作流程達到0.356，而提示級別的用戶需求滿足平均為0.71。<lb/>我們進一步進行了14名標註者的人類評估，以驗證DirectorBench與人類判斷之間的對齊。<lb/>結果顯示，DirectorBench捕捉到了人類可感知的質量差異，並揭示了由綜合評分隱藏的工作流程和檔案依賴的失敗模式。<lb/>這些發現突顯了對長格式視頻生成進行診斷和基於檔案的基準測試的重要性。
2605.30090.author: Jiamin Chen et.al.
2605.30090.authors: Jiamin Chen, Qianben Chen, Jiawen Zhang, Yidi Wu, Yuchen Li, Xiaokun Zhang, Wangchunshu Zhou, Chen Ma
